variants.label: Selected Hybrid
variants.description: Phase 05 winner: hybrid boundary slicing, balanced prose joins, and reclassify-first micro-region handling.

variants.label: Balanced
variants.description: Historical baseline: balanced boundary slicing, balanced prose joins, reclassify-first micro-region handling.

variants.label: Boundary Conservative
variants.description: Exact heading slicing only, with balanced prose joins and reclassify-first micro-region handling.

variants.label: Boundary Aggressive
variants.description: Balanced prose joins plus aggressive first-page heading slicing with inline-title tail preservation and short-prelude trimming.

variants.label: Prose Conservative
variants.description: Balanced boundary slicing with stricter region-join tolerances.

variants.label: Prose Aggressive
variants.description: Balanced boundary slicing with looser prose-continuation tolerances.

variants.label: Group First
variants.description: Balanced boundary and prose behavior, but group short micro-regions before prose/index reclassification.

variants.label: Boundary + Prose Aggressive
variants.description: Combined aggressive boundary slicing and aggressive prose-continuation repair.
